body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;background:#f0f0eb;color:#1a1a1a;overscroll-behavior:none} #app{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100vh;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto;background:#fff;position:relative;overflow:hidden} @media(min-width:620px){#app{border-radius:16px;margin:16px auto;height:calc(100vh - 32px);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.12)}} .content{flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column} .scroll-area{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;padding-bottom:16px} .pad{padding:0 16px} /* Nav */ .bottom-nav{display:flex;background:#fff;border-bottom:.5px solid #e0e0d8;flex-shrink:0;padding-top:env(safe-area-inset-top);overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none}.bottom-nav::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none} .nav-btn{flex:1;min-width:64px;padding:10px 0 8px;border:none;background:none;cursor:pointer;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:10px;color:#999;font-family:inherit;transition:color .15s;position:relative} .nav-btn.active{color:#185FA5} .nav-btn.active::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:24px;height:2.5px;background:#185FA5;border-radius:2px} .nav-icon{font-size:24px;line-height:1} /* Screen headers */ .sh{padding:16px 16px 12px;border-bottom:.5px solid #e0e0d8;flex-shrink:0} .sh h2{font-size:18px;font-weight:500} .sh p{font-size:12px;color:#888;margin-top:3px} .bh{padding:13px 16px 11px;border-bottom:.5px solid #e0e0d8;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:#fff} .bh-back{background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:26px;color:#888;padding:0;line-height:1;font-family:inherit} /* Cards */ .card{background:#fff;border:.5px solid #e0e0d8;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;margin-bottom:10px} .card:last-child{margin-bottom:0} /* Info sections */ .info-section{margin-bottom:20px} .info-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:500;color:#1a1a1a;margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:2px solid #185FA520;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px} .info-p{font-size:14px;color:#555;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:8px} /* Stats */ .stat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px} .stat{background:#f5f5f0;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 8px;text-align:center} .stat-l{font-size:10px;color:#888;margin-bottom:3px} .stat-v{font-size:20px;font-weight:500} .stat-s{font-size:10px;color:#888;margin-top:2px} /* Progress bars */ .pb{height:6px;background:#ebebea;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden} .pb-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .5s ease} /* Buttons */ .btn{padding:13px;border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;width:100%;border:none;font-family:inherit;transition:opacity .15s} .btn:active{opacity:.8} .btn-primary{background:#185FA5;color:#fff} .btn-outline{background:transparent;border:.5px solid #ccc;color:#333} .btn-danger{background:#E24B4A;color:#fff} .btn-sm{padding:9px 0;font-size:13px;border-radius:9px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;font-family:inherit;flex:1;border:none} /* Lesson content */ .lh{font-size:16px;font-weight:500;margin:20px 0 8px;color:#1a1a1a} .lp{font-size:14px;color:#555;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:12px} .formula{border-radius:8px;padding:12px 16px;margin:12px 0} .formula-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:5px} .formula-txt{font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.5} .tip{background:#FAEEDA;border-left:3px solid #EF9F27;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;padding:12px 16px;margin:14px 0} .tip-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:500;color:#854F0B;letter-spacing:.8px;margin-bottom:5px} .tip-txt{font-size:13px;color:#633806;line-height:1.55} .blist{list-style:none;margin:8px 0 14px} .blist li{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:14px;color:#555;line-height:1.5} .slist{list-style:none;margin:8px 0 14px} .slist li{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;font-size:14px;color:#555;line-height:1.5;align-items:flex-start} .snum{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px} /* Table */ .tbl-wrap{overflow-x:auto;margin:12px 0;border-radius:8px;border:.5px solid #e0e0d8} .tbl{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px} .tbl th{padding:9px 12px;text-align:left;font-weight:500;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1)} .tbl td{padding:8px 12px;border-bottom:.5px solid #e0e0d8;color:#555} .tbl tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} .tbl tr:nth-child(even) td{background:#f8f8f6} /* Quiz */ .q-opt{padding:12px 14px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px;transition:all .2s;border:.5px solid #e0e0d8;background:#f5f5f0} .q-opt:active{opacity:.8} .q-circle{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;border:.5px solid #bbb;background:#e5e5e0;color:#666} .q-text{font-size:14px;color:#1a1a1a;line-height:1.45;flex:1} /* Chat */ .chat-wrap{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px} .chat-wrap.user{flex-direction:row-reverse} .chat-av{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#E6F1FB;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0} .chat-bub{max-width:78%;padding:10px 14px;font-size:14px;line-height:1.55;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word} .chat-bub.user{border-radius:18px 18px 4px 18px;background:#185FA5;color:#fff} .chat-bub.assistant{border-radius:4px 18px 18px 18px;background:#f0f0eb;color:#1a1a1a} /* Intro specific */ .profile-hero{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0C447C 0%,#185FA5 60%,#378ADD 100%);padding:30px 20px 24px;text-align:center;color:#fff} .profile-img{width:100px;height:100px;border-radius:50%;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.8);object-fit:cover;margin-bottom:12px;display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto} .profile-name{font-size:20px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:4px} .profile-title{font-size:13px;opacity:.85;margin-bottom:8px} .profile-creds{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin-top:8px} .cred-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);border-radius:20px;padding:4px 12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:500} .welcome-box{background:#EAF3DE;border-left:4px solid #639922;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;padding:14px 16px;margin:16px 0} .welcome-box p{font-size:14px;color:#27500A;line-height:1.65} .part-card{border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:10px;border:.5px solid #e0e0d8} .part-header{padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between} .part-topics{padding:2px 14px 12px} .part-topic{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);font-size:13px} .part-topic:last-child{border-bottom:none} .cost-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:.5px solid #e0e0d8;font-size:14px} .cost-row:last-child{border-bottom:none} .cost-total{background:#E6F1FB;border-radius:8px;padding:12px 14px;margin-top:10px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-weight:500;font-size:14px;color:#0C447C} .window-card{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 14px;background:#f5f5f0;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:8px} .window-month{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#185FA5;width:120px;flex-shrink:0} .action-step{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:14px;align-items:flex-start} .action-num{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;background:#185FA5;color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px} .action-content h4{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:#1a1a1a;margin-bottom:3px} .action-content p{font-size:13px;color:#555;line-height:1.5} .score-circle{width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;border:4px solid #185FA5;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 12px} .ellipsis{white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis} .row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px} .row-sb{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between} .badge{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;white-space:nowrap} .sect-icon{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:19px;flex-shrink:0}
